# The BERT Moment: Pretraining as the New Regime {#sec-15-bert-pretraining}

::: {.callout-warning}
**Chapter stub.** This chapter is planned but not yet written. The abstract below is its
contract; drafting sources are listed for provenance.
:::

*Stop training from scratch. Masked language modeling, bidirectional context, fine-tuning — and why 2018 changed the default workflow of the field.*

<!-- draft-sources
seeds:
- `sources/bert.tex`
- `sources/10.2_pretrained.tex`
transcripts:
- `m10_10-2-pretrained-transformer-models_SDHOqinS8dg.txt`
-->
